chunks.text: University of California at Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Sciences Instructional Support Group /share/b/pub/ics.help Apr 24, 2006 Metrics ICS controls specialized semiconductor test a

rics ICS controls specialized semiconductor test and measurement instrumentation and provides easy setup for complex instrumentation through an interactive Microsoft Windows graphical user interface. It is installed on several PCs in 353 Cory to c

. It is installed on several PCs in 353 Cory to control the HP4155 A/B Semiconductor Parameter Analyzer. It is used primarily by EE105. See http://www.metricstech.com/ics/ for more information. EECS Instructional Support Group
EECS Instructional Support Group 384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
